introSection: Mini Mine Train was an Arrow Development hybrid kiddie roller coaster located at Six Flags Over Georgia in Austell, Georgia, USA. It crossed over the track of the Dahlonega Mine Train which is essentially a bigger version of the Mini Mine Train. The ride originally opened as Yahoola Hooler.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The Mini Mine Train had the same, if not, a similar design to the Mini Mine Train at Six Flags Over Texas.

fullText:
Mini Mine Train was an Arrow Development hybrid kiddie roller coaster located at Six Flags Over Georgia in Austell, Georgia, USA. It crossed over the track of the Dahlonega Mine Train which is essentially a bigger version of the Mini Mine Train. The ride originally opened as Yahoola Hooler.

The Mini Mine Train had the same, if not, a similar design to the Mini Mine Train at Six Flags Over Texas.
